overview.title: Executive Overview
overview.subtitle: Boutique Merchant Finance
overview.intro: 1st Capital Partners is a Financial Holding Company providing strategic oversight and capital solutions to a diversified portfolio of subsidiaries across financial and industrial sectors.
overview.point1.label: Headquarters
overview.point1.text: Domiciled in London with operational hubs in Luxembourg and the United Arab Emirates, giving us unmatched access to European and MENA capital markets.
overview.point2.label: Core Function
overview.point2.text: We act as a boutique merchant finance firm, offering bespoke capital structuring, strategic advisory, and governance support to lower middle-market companies.
overview.point3.label: Mission
overview.point3.text: To empower ambitious businesses through innovative capital structuring and global strategic relationships that unlock long-term enterprise value.

strategy.subtitle: Targeting growth in the lower middle-market

sectors.title: Sector Expertise
sectors.subtitle: Strategic exposure across resilient industries
sectors.card1.title: Industrial & Services
sectors.card1.desc: Manufacturing, value-added distribution, and business services with defensible market positions.
sectors.card2.title: Essential Sectors
sectors.card2.desc: Healthcare, food, and agriculture—industries with inelastic demand and stable cash flows.
sectors.card3.title: Real Estate
sectors.card3.desc: Commercial properties and retail destinations including shopping malls across key markets.
sectors.card4.title: Commodities & Natural Resources
sectors.card4.desc: Trade finance, commodity trading, and licensed subsidiaries in regulated resource markets.
value.title: Value Creation Model
value.subtitle: Driving efficiency through centralised oversight
value.intro: Our holding company structure enables systematic value creation across the portfolio through four interconnected pillars.
value.pillar1.title: Operational Synergy
value.pillar1.desc: Centralisation of IT, HR, legal, and accounting functions creates economies of scale across all subsidiaries, reducing overhead while maintaining quality.
value.pillar2.title: Asset Protection
value.pillar2.desc: Intellectual property and strategic real estate assets are shielded at the parent level, insulating the portfolio from subsidiary-level risk.
value.pillar3.title: Strategic Support
value.pillar3.desc: We deploy human and financial capital with precision—board appointments, executive placement, and strategic planning aligned with long-term objectives.
value.pillar4.title: Revenue Model
value.pillar4.desc: Dividend income from profitable subsidiary operations provides consistent returns while preserving reinvestment capacity for growth.
services.title: Practice Areas
services.subtitle: Global financial services & market access
services.card1.title: Strategic Advisory
services.card1.desc: Bespoke financing solutions and rigorous risk management evaluations. We provide independent analysis and innovative structuring for complex capital requirements.
services.card2.title: Capital Markets
services.card2.desc: Reverse Takeover (RTO) execution and IPO advisory—taking private companies public through strategic shell company transactions on major exchanges.
services.card3.title: Brokerage
services.card3.desc: Secondary market trading services on the London Stock Exchange and Bolsa de Valores de Lima, providing liquidity and market access for our clients.
services.card4.title: Wealth Management
services.card4.desc: Private wealth solutions and unit trust structures for institutional and retail investors seeking exposure to our curated portfolio strategies.
